name: WAV Recorder · Tape Deck
author: Douglas J. Cerrato (KB2UKA)
description: RX/TX tape deck extracted from Zeus core. Records float32 WAVs to <Downloads>/Zeus Recordings, browses/renames/moves/deletes them in folders, and plays a recording back locally (monitor) or over the air. Over-air playback keys MOX safely: it rides an operator-held key, only drops what it raised, never arms PureSignal, and never auto-keys.
